       <Routes>
         {/* Public routes */}

         <Route path="/register" element={!user ? <Register /> : <Navigate to="/" />} />
+        <Route path="/staff/orders" element={user?.role === 'admin' ? <StaffOrders /> : <Navigate to="/" />} />

           <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
